fixes_completed.title: Phase F wrapper CRLF syntax blocker fixed
fixes_completed.evidence: Line endings normalized; bash -n scripts/run_phase_f_v4_ollama_holdout.sh passes.
fixes_completed.impact: Phase F wrapper is runnable again.

fixes_completed.title: Phase G wrapper now refuses accidental full-core runs
fixes_completed.evidence: No MAX_CASES exits status 2 unless ALLOW_FULL_CORE_RUN=1; bash -n passes.
fixes_completed.impact: Dry-run safety restored for wrapper invocation.

fixes_completed.title: Reasoning-floor prompts aligned to v4 spec-only policy
fixes_completed.evidence: Concrete A-box example and T-box scaffolded template examples removed from src/guardian/prompts.py; tests assert absence of scaffold wording and anchor IDs.
fixes_completed.impact: Phase G prompt contract now matches the clean v4 policy more closely.

fixes_completed.title: Stale scripts/Ollama_VM_Runbook.md reconciled
fixes_completed.evidence: scripts/Ollama_VM_Runbook.md is now a thin pointer to docs-technical/Ollama_VM_Runbook.md.

fixes_completed.title: Track-diagnosis comparison rows now mark proposal metrics n/a
fixes_completed.evidence: prompt-dev comparison renderer emits n/a for Functional/Audit on track_diagnosis rows and n/a for Track acc on repair rows; existing v4 comparison markdown regenerated.
fixes_completed.impact: Reduces misleading zero-valued proposal metrics for track-only matrices.

fixes_completed.title: Repository line-ending guard added
fixes_completed.evidence: .gitattributes pins *.sh, scripts/*.md, and docs-technical/*.md to LF.

fixes_completed.title: Required non-inference tests pass
fixes_completed.impact: Current patched code paths pass the requested gate.

remaining_warnings.title: Phase G dry-run artifacts are still absent locally
remaining_warnings.evidence: reports/reasoning_floor contains no local run artifacts to validate.
remaining_warnings.impact: Full Phase G main oracle remains unapproved until 16/64 dry-run artifacts exist and are reviewed.

remaining_warnings.title: v4 no-abstain proposal parse rate remains warning-level in existing artifacts
remaining_warnings.evidence: spec_only_holdout_report parse_gate: 6/192 proposal prompts = 3.125%; 6/384 all prompts = 1.5625%; request errors 0.
remaining_warnings.impact: Acceptable for bounded dry-run monitoring; not a claim of high-performance or perfect parse stability.

remaining_warnings.title: Abstention branch remains experimental and not Phase-G-main ready
remaining_warnings.evidence: Existing abstention artifacts have 48/96 and 50/96 repair proposal parse errors; docs now state first-class parser/evaluator support is required.
remaining_warnings.impact: Do not use abstention in Phase G main.
